query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ae_profiles) as total_aes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals) as total_deals,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commission_payouts) as total_payouts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM monthly_metrics) as total_metrics;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ae_profiles) as total_aes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals) as total_deals,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commission_payouts) as total_payouts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM monthly_metrics) as total_metrics;
